use_cases: Creating animated image trails that follow cursor movement for visual engagement
Building interactive galleries with images that spawn and animate on mouse movement
Adding playful image sequences to portfolio or creative showcase sites
Enhancing e-commerce product discovery with floating product image trails
Creating attention-grabbing visual effects for hero sections or landing pages
ai_summary: An interactive image trail component that spawns and animates child images in sequence following cursor movement. Features configurable rotation ranges, animation sequences, velocity-based spawning, and optional container ref targeting. Built with Framer Motion for smooth animations and uses a custom hook for mouse vector tracking. Ideal for creative portfolios, media sites, or any project seeking playful cursor-following visual effects.
